description_long: This object is a rectangular stick deodorant container with a blue cap and base, and a light gray body. The front face features a label with handwritten-style text that reads 'Deoderant only works on Tuesdays.' The cap and base are both slightly rounded, and the cap fits snugly over the top of the container. The bottom has a small dial or wheel, typical for twist-up stick dispensers, which is visible as a cutout. The sides are smooth and unadorned, while the back is plain with no visible text or graphics.
description: A blue and gray stick deodorant container with a humorous label and a twist-up base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue cap, gray body, and a label with handwritten text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the blue cap and base, with no visible label.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain gray surface with blue cap and base, no text or graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and blue cap and base.
